judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Amenities such as gym, rooftop terrace, and coworking lounges (no field for property amenities)', 'Neighborhood descriptors like arts and design area or cultural hub beyond fixed location_neighborhood values', 'Estimated closing with flexible or optional extension terms (template has no field for flexible closing or extension options)', 'Mention of specific lenders (e.g., TD Canada Trust, RBC) — not supported under financing_options', 'Property Search Concierge service (coordination add-on) not listed in service_packages or moving_services', 'Optional add-ons like furniture assembly and appliance installation — not covered under utility_services or moving_services']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Condo property listings with size, price, condo fees, and location', 'Layout type described as open_concept or flexible den mapping to layout_type', 'Condo fees mapped to condo_fees_monthly', 'Financing options with purchase_method=mortgage, interest_rate, down_payment_required, mortgage_term_years', 'Down payment percentage and amount', 'Legal service packages with cost, duration_days, and service_level=basic/premium', 'Rush legal service mapped to service_packages with service_level=premium or white_glove and timeline coordination', 'Title insurance costs mapped to financing_options.title_insurance', 'Closing timeline coordination under timeline_coordination with completion_window=Q2–Q3', 'Moving services (basic, premium) under moving_services with cost, currency, and service_level', 'Utility setup packages (basic, premium) under utility_services with services_included and cost', 'Smart home package mapped to utility_services.smart_home_integration=yes', 'Total cost estimates mapped to total_package_summary.grand_total', 'Coordination proposal for legal + moving + utilities under total_package_summary and service_coordination', 'Status and timeline adjustments (Spring/Fall 2025) captured by timeline_coordination.preferred_season and completion_date_range']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 6, ['Amenities such as gym, rooftop terrace, and coworking lounges (no field for property amenities)', 'Neighborhood descriptors like arts and design area or cultural hub beyond fixed location_neighborhood values', 'Estimated closing with flexible or optional extension terms (template has no field for flexible closing or extension options)', 'Mention of specific lenders (e.g., TD Canada Trust, RBC) — not supported under financing_options', 'Property Search Concierge service (coordination add-on) not listed in service_packages or moving_services', 'Optional add-ons like furniture assembly and appliance installation — not covered under utility_services or moving_services']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Condo property listings with size, price, condo fees, and location', 'Layout type described as open_concept or flexible den mapping to layout_type', 'Condo fees mapped to condo_fees_monthly', 'Financing options with purchase_method=mortgage, interest_rate, down_payment_required, mortgage_term_years', 'Down payment percentage and amount', 'Legal service packages with cost, duration_days, and service_level=basic/premium', 'Rush legal service mapped to service_packages with service_level=premium or white_glove and timeline coordination', 'Title insurance costs mapped to financing_options.title_insurance', 'Closing timeline coordination under timeline_coordination with completion_window=Q2–Q3', 'Moving services (basic, premium) under moving_services with cost, currency, and service_level', 'Utility setup packages (basic, premium) under utility_services with services_included and cost', 'Smart home package mapped to utility_services.smart_home_integration=yes', 'Total cost estimates mapped to total_package_summary.grand_total', 'Coordination proposal for legal + moving + utilities under total_package_summary and service_coordination', 'Status and timeline adjustments (Spring/Fall 2025) captured by timeline_coordination.preferred_season and completion_date_range']
